creator: tj+freebsd_bugs@a13.fr
text:
Created attachment 178859
`x11-wm/rubygem-uh-layout' port shar file

`uh-layout' is a ruby gem providing a tiling and stacking layout for
`uh-wm' ruby gem.

I'm the author of all these gems, and can maintains the ports. I would
like this one to be added in `x11-wm' port category.

Thank you.
